summary: End-to-end testing of KYNTHIA brand site (FastAPI + React 19 + raw Three.js + Lenis). All 11 backend pytest tests passed and all critical frontend flows verified including hero Three.js canvas, Lenis smooth scroll navigation, three tier cards (Echo/Aether/Cosmos with Cosmos canvas), portfolio grid (6 items), end-to-end quote form submission with success toast and DB persistence, empty-form validation NOT calling backend, and mobile menu navigation.

minor.issue: Returns 200 OK on success — fine but typically POST creates should be 201. Not a blocker.

issues: Three.js Clock deprecation warnings (THREE.Clock -> THREE.Timer) — non-blocking, just warning noise.
Lenis warning: 'container has a non-static position' — non-blocking.
nav-logo button calls scrollTo('top') but no element with id='top' exists; click has no effect (falls into `if (!el) return`). Cosmetic.

Empty submit is correctly blocked (no POST), but HTML5 `required` browser tooltip fires before sonner toast, so the JS error toast 'Please fill in your name, email and a short message.' is never shown. Backend is correctly not called. Consider removing `required` attribute on name/email/message if you want the JS toast to be the primary feedback path.

action_items: (Optional) Add id='top' element or change nav-logo to scroll to hero-section so logo click works.
(Optional) Remove HTML5 `required` from name/email/message inputs in Contact.jsx so the custom sonner error toast shows on empty submit (currently HTML5 validation pre-empts the JS toast).
(Optional) Replace deprecated THREE.Clock with THREE.Timer in Hero/CosmosVisual to silence console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: POST /api/quote returns status 200 instead of 201 Created (FastAPI default). Consider status_code=201 for semantic correctness.

server.py: created_at is stored as ISO string in MongoDB and parsed back in GET; this works but is inconsistent with using a native datetime. Consider storing as native datetime for proper Mongo sorting on ts type.
server.py: send_quote_email branches on env vars at runtime — good no-op behavior verified (email_sent=false when keys empty).
Contact.jsx: HTML5 `required` attribute conflicts with the JS toast validation path — see frontend issues.
Navbar.jsx: scrollTo('top') target id does not exist anywhere in the DOM; logo click is a silent no-op.
All required data-testids are present and reliable. No MongoDB _id leakage in /api/quotes.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_-prefixed Quote records via pytest and one via Playwright (test_pw@example.com / cosmos). These persist in test_database.quotes — safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend resend keys intentionally empty — verified email_sent=false no-op path. Use BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. For UI scroll testing, use window.__lenis.scrollTo(el, { immediate: true }) since Lenis intercepts native scroll. All data-testids work as documented in problem statement. Two <canvas> elements present: hero torus-knot + cosmos tier visual.
